section_name: Disposition of Fees for Permit for Movement of Cylindrical Hay Bales
chapter_title: Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
text:
Of each fee collected under Section 623.017 (Permit for Movement of Cylindrical Hay Bales) , the department shall deposit:

(1) 90 percent in the state treasury to the credit of the state highway fund; and

(2) 10 percent in the state treasury to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 621. Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
##### § 621.354 — Disposition of Fees for Permit for Movement of Cylindrical Hay Bales

Of each fee collected under Section 623.017 (Permit for Movement of Cylindrical Hay Bales) , the department shall deposit:

    (1) 90 percent in the state treasury to the credit of the state highway fund; and

    (2) 10 percent in the state treasury to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1287 (H.B.2202), Sec. 50, eff. September 1, 2013.*

subsections.text: Of each fee collected under Section 623.017 (Permit for Movement of Cylindrical Hay Bales) , the department shall deposit:
90 percent in the state treasury to the credit of the state highway fund; and
10 percent in the state treasury to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund.
